title: Raat Akeli Hai
tmdbOverview: When a newly married landlord is murdered, a misfit cop’s investigation is complicated by the victim’s secretive family and his own conflicted heart.
synopsis: Raat Akeli Hai is a 2020 crime, mystery and thriller film from India. It holds a solid 7.2 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R18+ certification (JP rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
